[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: The image shows a black-and-white illustration of an open mouth with teeth, accompanied by Indonesian text above it.

Main Subject:
A stylized close-up mouth illustration fills the lower portion of the image, showing dark lips and visible teeth with a glossy, high-contrast look.

Setting:
The background is plain white with no visible outdoor or indoor setting; the composition appears like a graphic poster or meme.

Visual Details:
The text at the top is centered and black, set in a simple sans-serif font with multiple lines. The mouth illustration is centered below the text, with dark shading around the lips and lighter teeth, creating a stark contrast. On the right side of the mouth area, there is a small circular symbol and faint text watermark that is partially legible.

Visible Text:
gaada waktu buat iri,  
sorry gue punya gaya  
sendiri  
@iarrayv

Practical Summary:
A graphic image displays Indonesian text above a monochrome mouth with visible teeth. The white background and high-contrast illustration give it a meme-like appearance.
- Hasil Ekstraksi Teks Gambar (OCR):
# Extracted Text

gaada waktu buat iri,  
sorry gue punya gaya sendiri

@liarvy

# Structured Version

- gaada waktu buat iri,  
- sorry gue punya gaya sendiri  
- @liarvy

# Notes

- The handle `@liarvy` is small and partially stylized, but it appears to read exactly as shown.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
